text:
In the quiet town of Willow Creek, every Saturday morning begins with the sound of birdsong and the rustling leaves. Every Thursday night, a fox hunts through the dense woods on the edge of town. This fox speaks no language other than fox talk. It loves old movies.

Here's how it might chat during a Monday morning stroll:

"G'day, mate! Fancy seeing you here. Ever seen Casablanca? Hoping I'll find Love Potion Nocturne?

Oh! You've got those eyes.

Well, there's something about these movies...

Look down. That's me!

Nope. Your tail.


You think you see my face.


Yeah.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
